calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Fairchild for Petitioner.

Ms. Fairchild had nothing to add. The Court made a factual finding that there is sufficient evidence to find that the missing person (Kawika Chetron) is presumed dead and date of death is March 18, 2012. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $10,000.00. Ms. Fairchild will file submit an updated Inventory and Appraisal, and may file a Petition to Terminate the Conservatorship.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
